other_observers: I believe all members of the DFO trip saw this bird, including Andrew Spencer, Joey Kellner, Steve Larson, Joe Roller, Norm Erthal, Lisa Edwards, Allison Hilf, Paul Differding and others.; I believe Andrew Spencer may have spotted the bird.
duration: roughly 60 seconds of views across 10 minutes of observation
specific_location: In trees along inlet canal at Prewitt SWA, maybe 100 meters SE of where you park the cars.
description: Here I reproduce my field notes verbatim: "Medium-large, chunky warbler. Yellow head and upper breast, white belly and undertail coverts. Two white wingbars. Didn't get great look at back color, but impression was green. Andrew Spencer and others claimed wings were 'blue,' but I never saw this. Face pattern 'messy' and a little complicated--definitely a faint darker line through the eye and what appeared to be a brighter yellow eyebrow. Faint dusky streaks on sides of chest."Behaviors: Bird foraged actively and silently at 15-25 feet in willows (mid-upper levels).Call: bird was silentPlumage: adult alternate
